calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jul-31-2013 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald E Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff CSV Hospitality Management LLC is present. Represented by Latrice Ranson.
Attorney Howard Olsen appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Kasey Van Horn present.
Attorney Dennis Lee representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of Aug. 5, 2013 vacated. (501/JPT)
